productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Woven Green Belt
description: Style Note flying machine's swash-buckle styling is now available in its belts, pun intended! Riveting, bold designs at an affordable price, this FM belt is a buy you will not regret - as long lasting as it is stylish.  Product Details Green fabric belt with a tang clasp (and a fixed loop)Metal eyelets that act as holes for the belt Brand patch at the tail of the belt Material and Care Fabric Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size and Fit Length at largest setting: 106 cm
